title: Bulk Update User Email Preferences
excerpt: As an admin i should be able to bulk edit what emails users elect to receive. I should not have to rely on all 100+ users updating their own settings OR having to go 1-by-1 to each user and do it myself.

posts.author: toallenlinksquares (Tom Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: As an admin i should be able to bulk edit what emails users elect to receive. I should not have to rely on all 100+ users updating their own settings OR having to go 1-by-1 to each user and do it myself.
